targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM messages WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(from_end_user_id::text, from_account_id::text)) AS users FROM messages WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(message_tokens + answer_tokens), 0) AS tokens FROM messages WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(provider_response_latency), 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_latency FROM messages WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, status, COUNT(*) AS msgs FROM messages WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT a.name AS app_name, COUNT(*) AS msgs FROM messages m JOIN apps a ON a.id = m.app_id WHERE m.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY a.name ORDER BY msgs DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT m.created_at, a.name AS app, COALESCE(acc.email, 'end_user:' || m.from_end_user_id::text, 'unknown') AS "user", LEFT(m.query, 120) AS query, LEFT(m.answer, 200) AS answer, m.message_tokens + m.answer_tokens AS tokens, ROUND(m.provider_response_latency::numeric, 2) AS latency_s, m.status FROM messages m LEFT JOIN apps a ON a.id = m.app_id LEFT JOIN accounts acc ON acc.id = m.from_account_id WHERE m.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: KB retrieval hit count by document

targets.rawSql: SELECT dataset_name || ' / ' || document_name AS doc, COUNT(*) AS hits FROM dataset_retriever_resources r JOIN messages m ON m.id = r.message_id WHERE m.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY doc ORDER BY hits DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS errors FROM messages WHERE created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND status != 'normal' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
